backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the LOBODA Jewelry backend, defining product/category/transaction data types, pagination helpers, admin authorization, and HTTP outcall support via the IC management canister. Includes blob storage mixin and state maps for products, categories, transactions, user profiles, and admin principals.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the logo asset replacement (transparent-background versions of loboda-logo.png and loboda-logo-icon.png) is implemented with high confidence, referencing test ID REQ-8 and listing the involved components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick-reference index of each component's purpose and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the LOBODA Jewelry React app, loading Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond and Montserrat), setting the page title, and pointing the favicon to the logo PNG asset.
frontend/src/App.css: Empty CSS file with no styles defined.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for home, category, about, contact, admin, dashboard, and payment success pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and CartProvider.
frontend/src/components/AboutUs.tsx: About page component featuring a charcoal hero section, a two-column brand story layout with an image, and a four-value grid (Quality, Compliance, Passion, Trust) styled with the luxury serif/gold theme.
frontend/src/components/Admin.tsx: Full-featured admin dashboard component with tabbed UI for managing products, categories, transactions, admins, and settings, including bulk edit/delete, CRUD modals, pagination, and Internet Identity authentication gating.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin dashboard component with tabs for managing products and categories, including dialogs for adding, editing, and deleting products, and adding categories. Uses React Query hooks for backend operations and requires admin authentication.
frontend/src/components/Cart.tsx: Slide-in cart sidebar component that displays cart items with quantity controls and handles Stripe checkout session creation, redirecting users to Stripe on success.
frontend/src/components/ContactUs.tsx: Contact page component displaying business contact info and a contact form with simulated submission that shows a success toast notification.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with navigation links organized by category (Engagement, Jewelry, Gemstones, Company), brand logo, social media icons, and copyright info.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with dropdown navigation, mobile menu, Internet Identity login/logout, cart icon, and admin dashboard link for authenticated admin users.
frontend/src/components/Marketplace.tsx: Displays a jewelry marketplace with category browsing, product grids, trust badges, and a 'coming soon' email signup state when no products exist for a category.
frontend/src/components/Pagination.tsx: Reusable pagination component that renders previous/next buttons and numbered page buttons, showing item range counts for desktop and simplified controls for mobile.
frontend/src/components/PaymentSuccess.t: Handles post-checkout flow by polling a transaction status after Stripe redirect, displaying processing, success, or error states with appropriate UI feedback.
frontend/src/components/Router.tsx: Lightweight custom client-side router providing RouterProvider context, a Route matcher, and a Link component using the History API.
frontend/src/components/TransactionDetai: Modal that fetches and displays Stripe checkout line items and shipping details for a given session, with automatic pagination support for large item lists.
frontend/src/components/UserAccount.tsx: User account page that handles Internet Identity login/logout, profile name editing, and displays the user's order transaction history with status icons.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Defines a React context and reducer for shopping cart state, providing actions to add, remove, update, and clear items, plus cart open/close toggling and total price/item count helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing a React context and provider with login, logout, and identity state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend data operations including fetching, adding, editing, and deleting products and categories, as well as order and user management mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that configures Tailwind CSS, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a luxury jewelry brand theme (gold, charcoal, ivory), and adds reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/libs/test_data.ts: Contains static test data arrays for categories and products (jewelry items with names, descriptions, prices in cents, and image URLs) used for development and testing.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the LOBODA Jewelry frontend, extending the theme with luxury color tokens (gold, charcoal, ivory), serif/sans font families, custom shadows, letter spacing, and accordion/fade-in animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state (version 7) of the LOBODA Jewelry dropshipping storefront project, recording architectural notes, known issues, image processing requirements, and a list of already-implemented features such as navigation, logo replacement, and category grid updates.
